description: Wire hex-reviewer into the RL model selection loop, add JSON retry with model upgrade, and emit a fallback verdict so ReviewPasses is never permanently blocked by flaky free-model output

specs.description: Reviewer RL model selection — RL engine is queried for hex-reviewer role
specs.given: The Q-table has prior history for task_type='structured_review'
specs.then: Returns a SelectedModel with source=RlEngine and the model ID preserved in native provider/model format

domain_conventions.selection_priority: RL first, YAML fallback when Q-table has no entry

specs.description: Valid JSON verdict reports positive reward to RL engine
specs.given: The reviewer agent returns a response containing valid JSON with verdict='PASSES' or 'NEEDS_FIXES'
specs.then: POST /api/rl/reward is called with reward >= 0.4 for the (state_key, action) pair used during selection

specs.description: Non-JSON response triggers retry with explicit JSON instruction
specs.given: The reviewer returns a response that cannot be parsed as JSON (prose, markdown, empty string)
specs.when: The reviewer invocation result is evaluated
specs.then: The prompt is retried with an appended JSON-enforcement instruction; the same model is used on retry 1

domain_conventions.json_enforcement_suffix: Respond ONLY with a JSON object matching {"verdict":"PASSES"|"NEEDS_FIXES","issues":[...]}. No prose, no markdown.

specs.description: Second retry upgrades to a higher model tier
specs.given: Retry 1 (same model + JSON instruction) also fails to return valid JSON
specs.then: The model is upgraded to the next tier (preferred → upgrade_model from YAML), and the JSON-enforcement instruction is included

specs.description: Non-JSON response reports negative reward to RL engine
specs.given: The reviewer returns invalid JSON after all retries are exhausted
specs.then: POST /api/rl/reward is called with reward=-0.8 for the (state_key, action) pair; a warning is logged

specs.description: Fallback auto-PASSES verdict when all retries fail — tier is not permanently blocked
specs.given: Reviewer invocation fails to produce valid JSON across all attempts (original + 2 retries)
specs.when: evaluate_review_passes is called for this tier
specs.then: A synthetic PASSES verdict is written to .hex-review/<tier>.json with issues=[] and a warning field 'reviewer_skipped: true'; ReviewPasses clears; a tracing warn is emitted

specs.description: RL model routing cannot select a model that produces NEEDS_FIXES indefinitely as 'good'
specs.given: A model consistently returns valid NEEDS_FIXES JSON (structured output success) but the coder never fixes the issues
specs.then: The tier hits max_iterations and escalates; the reviewer's structured-output reward (+0.4) does not prevent escalation — it only tracks JSON reliability, not whether issues are resolved

domain_conventions.note: Reviewer reward tracks output FORMAT reliability, not verdict correctness. Fix-loop convergence is a separate gate.

specs.description: RL-selected reviewer model survives the extract_model_from_action fix
specs.given: The RL engine recommends 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6' for the reviewer role
specs.when: extract_model_from_action converts the RL action to a model ID
specs.then: The resulting model ID is 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6' (unchanged), not 'openrouter-anthropic-claude-sonnet-4-6'

domain_conventions.dependency: Requires feat-fix-rl-model-routing step-1 to be merged first
